This is a great restaurant. The food is consistently fresh and delicious. They are accommodating if you want something adjusted on the menu, and the staff is friendly. The place is always very clean. Kid friendly too.

Great place for play time. Great food and good service even when they are busy. We had the 12' cheese pizza and house salad. Both were fresh and delicious. All the toys are cleaned daily and they have a washing station and hand sanitizer as soon as you walk in the door. I love this place
Perfect addition to the neighborhood. Loving every pizza and beer, and the friendly service.
upscale: This store is a fresh addition to the avenue with well constructed, fashion forward casual clothing appealing to a wide range of ages, employing helpful, knowledgable staff in a clean bright atmosphere.
Great good, stylish decor, top-notch speed-of-service.
Delicious menu, fair prices, and good atmosphere.  The owner is very friendly as well.
A hidden gem. Excellent food, huge portions, reasonable pricing for what you get. Very modern decor that made me feel like I was eating somewhere luxurious- though still casual.
Great service, cozy atmosphere, great specialty rolls.
cultural: Perfect place to celebrate my birthday. Everything from the service to the robust/perfectly seasoned food to the warm and rustic ambiance... Simply amazing.

Great local, cozy place, with very warm and friendly service - the owner makes it a point to say hello when you come in.  Service is very attentive, back dining room is intimate but not crowded or noisy.  There's a cool bar area in the front to get drinks and watch a game.  Been for dinner a few ...
Great food and beer. A bit pricey, but worth it. Good place for family and friends. Great place to celebrate special occasions.

Extraordinary experience. Fine dining without the attitude. Wonderful location at the top of Chestnut Hill.  This was our third time at Mica for dinner and have yet to be dsappointed. Great place to see local celebrities and foodies.
World class cuisine. Excellent Food and Excellent Service. Most enjoyable restaurant.

artsy: Cool art work on the walls. Clean! Plenty of waiters and the nice manager at the front. Food was awesome! A really sweet hole in the wall spot.

It's a hair salon and a gallery. The owner of the shop is a generous lady who taught herself painting, which is impressive, and you can see her works on the walls. We even talked about architecture of eastern and western. Try this, it is certainly not an ordinary hair salon.

The staff was cheerful and talkative. The options for a creative mix are endless and the result is tasty! Definitely plan to watch your creation come together because the entertainment and art is half the reward!

Truly an artist. They are inclusive, creative, and kind. I gave them some inspiration pictures of the design I wanted shaved onto my head for my wedding. They discussed everything with me, right down to which way the shading would go.

Everything was perfect and I got TONS of compliments. I even ...

We are so happy we decided to book with George Street for our wedding. Not only were they the most affordable company to work with, but their customer service was superb and the pictures were made available to us super quick! We loved doing the style quiz which suggested a few different photograp...
foodie: Not enough words in my Chef vocabulary to describe this place. The flavors and ingredients to choose from was amazing.  Melt in your mouth Wagyu to die for. Staff was amazing! Now my favorite place to eat! I was in Culinary Heaven!

This place is perfect on a cold or rainy day when you're craving something warm or hot. They have many options from their menu such as hot pot, seafood boil, stir fry, etc so everybody has options whether you're a vegetarian, pescatarian or looking for meat! The establishment was very clean and t...

The food was spectacular along with our server Way. He answered every question we had. Getting a table was a little difficult because it was so busy but overall the atmosphere is fantastic and def a place to try at least once. We aren't from here so this was really pleasant.  Pictured below is th...

Great service. Favorite dishes: mango beef, seafood fried rice, Mee Prawn soup and more. Extremely nice waiters and waitresses. Highly recommended. When my soup was salty, they didn't hesitate to get me a new one.

Excellent tasting food and a great service. The suggestions from the server. Don't be fooled by the menu, they offer anything from the menu in a vegetarian option. Would not hesitate to come back here. All the dishes we ordered had distinct tastes and we shared in the family. We could not decide ...
nightlife: Another great night at Bar-Ly in the books. I love this local sports bar with 60 beers on tap and a great selection of liquor. The service is great! The staff is very friendly. The food menu is great for the late night crowds or just the typical lunch/dinner.  I shall be back again and again and ...
I love bar-ly always a good time with a pleasant atmosphere and very affordable drinks and food!!
awesome bar good happy hour from 10-12 for young adults that ACTUALLY have a job..cheap food but super delicious. D and Jamie were awesome bartenders. such a good time
Excellent atmosphere, great happy hour, excellent bar tenders.  Flat screens throughout the bar, plenty of seating.  Highly recommended to have drinks.

If you want to go to a classy low key lounge/bar that offers spectacular crafted cocktails, this is where its happening. 

Dress to impress, follow the rules and you'll enjoy a wonderful evening. Also be aware that this is a CASH ONLY establishment.
family: Good place for families and/or groups. Staff was attentive and generously checked in on our group of six adults and one toddler. We ordered family style.

Update: Have been here three times in the past year. The food remains outstanding and the price and quantity extremely satisfying to both wallet and stomach!  What I truly appreciate as a parent about this place is they really are good with kids!! Each time they have very graciously accommodate o...

I took my family to see the Friendship Gate and this was a few stores down from it.  My daughter loved it because it had a lot of Hello kitty items and apparel.  My son liked all of the other toys that he couldn't get in normal chain stores.  Only issue was the owner kept following us around.

Simply AMAZING! Food and service rule!!!! NIce quiet place for a first time get together with a date or relax with friends. Nice clientele and the owners are the best. Very nice family. WIsh them the best!

The food is amazing and reasonably priced. The menu isn't overwhelming at all. My ramen bowl was $10 and it's enough to feed two people. My two complaints are it's impossible to get into this business with a stroller if you are walking around the city. It has 2 doors at the entrance and it's just...
upscale: Fun atmosphere; quick service; delicious (but not healthy).

Upscale. All Americans in there so the level of authentic  is not there like I wanted it. If you want traditional this is not the best place. The place is small but very clean. Great staff. Nothing bad to say

Sincere, clean, enjoyable, elegant romantic indulgence. The only bar in which one can actually be certain that the atmosphere will not be ruined by loud and/or uncouth behavior and/or disrespectfully distasteful fashion-related choices on the part of guests and/or irritatingly loud and/or distast...
Acceptable service and prices.

Super bougie interior, don't come here if you're on your last dime. But, other than that. Pretty cool place. Conveyor belt ingredients for the hotpot, good mix of fresh meat. Good quality food overall and an experience I won't forget. Can't really hate on the price bc you're def paying for the ex...
cultural: Authentic cuisine, nice service.  Spacious. Great place for traditional family and friends gathering.
Great place to get some somewhat authentic ethnic food. Lots of seating, decent service, definitely great for a casual meal.

Red Kings, at this location, completely changed their menu and decor over the last year or so.  Stopped by for lunch and it was great.  It was more like a Chinese Izakaya.  Many small plates and offerings on skewers.  Food was excellent.

The Halal guys participated at the Philadelphia restaurant festival.  It was one of the longer lines at the event since they were handing out very generously sized portions of fresh made and customized halal bowls.  We had rice with lamb meat, and tzaziki sauce.  The staff was really friendly and...

a great traditional family owned and orientated for two generations restaurant. 
friendly owners and servers, fair price, some dishes are amazing, especially the BBQ sampler! they are featured on travel channels, different magazines, almost everyone loves this place!

artsy: These murals really make my day as I take the "L" into the city. The anonymous romance gets me every time. I have been going down Market for a year, and every now and then I see one I hadn't noticed before. I know there is a tour and everything, but I prefer the child-like game of search and find:)

Cast aside all thoughts and desires to be cool because if you ride the El through West Philly be prepared to start to spaz out.  I can't help myself from whipping my head back and forth, trying not to miss any of Steve Powers powerful murals every time I ride. 

Words really fail to describe the ...

Oh Steve Powers, what a magnificent gift you have given Market street.

These murals mean so much to me that moments after his book signing, I walked next door and got one of Steve's pieces of art tattooed on my left arm.  

This just makes me want so much more - and please, if you are reading th...

It's not often I say that I'm lucky to take SEPTA's Market-Frankford line to and from work every day, but it's great to look out the window and see these simple, but touching and sometimes funny murals. This is probably something that they don't talk about in the guidebooks but definitely a cool ...

pretty sweet. I went on the guided tour this afternoon and Steve Powers is brilliant. This is perfect for Philly, and it's really eye opening going into West Philly to check out this artwork. The guide new a ton about the murals and how the project was made. I highly suggest you take this tour wi...
foodie: This is a great place for some home cooked food on the go this place is Amazing the food is just Amazing every thing is Fresh. The Kitchen very clean  its very hard to find Great Soul food in the city and ol boys have fix that Problem!!!

I really liked this spot. I Ordered fried chicken wings, baked Mac n cheese and collard greens. While it wasn't as great as grandmom's food, it came in a close second. I will definitely be ordering again and trying their other dishes.

The food here is delicious and the staff very friendly! I ordered the oxtails and to my surprise it came with more than enough food to take home later. They brought us out a complimentary salad with our meal and we also ordered the mac and cheese which was amazing!! My best friend had a spinach t...

Ol' Boys Soul Food Restaurant opened in the summer of 2013 in an area that looks a little neglected- I say this because we parked next to an abandoned house whose first floor was covered in garbage. I can't say I have done too much dining around the 60th and Locust area. But that might change now...

I visit Philadelphia, PA every year during the summer and I'm always looking for the best places to eat in town. I am NOT a fan of touristy spots; I like to eat where the locals eat. I heard about Joyce's from some friends who live in Philadelphia and started checking them out of Facebook before ...
nightlife: I discovered this bar on one of my random treks through the city years ago.  I'm not a club person so I enjoy smaller bars/lounges with a good crowd, drinks and dj. This is considered to be an "oldhead " bar meaning the crowd is pretty much 35 and over. Leaning more towards the over part. Drinks ...
The Dj here is really good and this place has the best kitchen open late nights. Great environment, the buffalo chicken wings and cheesesteak here taste amazing!
This bar is ok. I've been there a few times, mainly just for happy hour and hookah. The food is great, music is poppin, the drinks are ok. I just wish there were more liquor in them lol.

This place epitomizes the terms "hood bar". Right on 61st and market I believe. Cool bartenders who make the drinks strong. The hookah is cheap and they refill it for you about 3-4 times. I only go early Friday evening for happy hour.

Upgrading my review. This is probably my favorite bar in the whole world. Great live Jazz weekends (early evening.) Dirt cheap.. no cover for GREAT Philly musicians. Also, if you're nervous because you happen to be white, get over it. I have never felt so welcome in a bar anywhere... by the owner...
family: I usually take the children I nanny or my nieces & nephews. Either way, everyone enjoys themselves. The staff is really helpful & friendly. There's roller skating in warmer months & the rink is ice skating during the winter. This is the only rink i attend in the city. Very affordable prices!

This place have been open since I was in grade school. I'm in my early thirties now, they always been known to have good food. They've been owned by the same people &  the same workers have been cooking their food for years ,so it pretty much taste the same. Good !

I appreciate this business so much. A couple years ago they opened up around the corner from my job. They have been consistently courteous and delicious since they opened!

A diamond in the rough. Good and inexpensive fruitty ice, soft serve, and giant pretzels. Friendly people and nice slice of real Philly.

D. I. V. E. bar!  where everybody knows your name and you can make friends with an ex-convict and the lovely gentleman bartender. 
 
 they get the newest PBC beers first and they're cheap!  Last I was there as the last stop of my night out, an awful michael douglas movie was playing on their tvs....
Perfect hang-out gastro pub. Great apps and sandwiches with a spectacular collection of drinks. Not to mention very friendly and helpful service.

fun little bar in kensington. the drinks are cheap, the music's loud, and the bartenders know everyone's name. and, best of all - free food! maybe it was just a friday night happy hour thing, but I'm not complaining!

Excellent new local pub. More than simple bar snacks. Great beer selection. Food outsourced from local favorites (good spoon, reanimator, Kensington Quarters). Comfortable decor complete with a fireplace. Another great addition to the neighborhood.

Great local neighborhood bar.  I love the quizzo nights and the really reasonable selection of beers from PBC.  I think everyone should come here at least once.  BTW, what happened to the sharks in the fish tank?
family: My favorite place in the neighborhood for all things tasty, warm, refreshing, friendly, and chill. Absolutely kid friendly, absolutely all people friendly. Love this place.
So excited to have this place in the neighborhood. Open super early and very kid friendly. Food is delicious. Highly recommend the freshly fried donuts and breakfast sandwiches are my favorite.

My favorite place to go in the neighborhood. The atmosphere can't be beat--the music is good and not too loud, it's airy, comfortable and welcoming. I found myself looking for a safe place for our newly adopted boy to stay while we spent the day in Philly. Thankfully we hit the Jackpot!

  After six hours of play he wa...
Wonderful staff, food and drinks.  Love all the ties with other local establishments.  Upstairs is very relaxed, we took our 1 year old who also enjoyed herself.  We will be back often!
upscale: Delicious everything, refreshingly new take on the local food and drink spot. High ceilings, cozy but not stuffy, it's a great place to meet up & chat over drinks.

We enjoyed a lovely evening at this very cozy spot on Saturday. Great soups, great sandwiches, and great service. Our server Mary was attentive, knowledgeable, and courteous. Always a go to when in the neighborhood.

Cute place. Friendly ownership. Well kept and organized. Quiet environment, so good for a private conversation or some study. Didn't try any of the food though.

This place is amazing on several different levels: black-owned business!, comic books, good food for diverse palates and preferences, the drink names alone give the place a relaxing solace from the hussle and bussle of the city life. Go and you won't regret it!

Just a cool place to visit!!! Great tour, good amount of free beer, and a great big..very busy tasting room.  Place had a great true bar hangout atmosphere, great place to take people from outta town!

upscale: Large authentic menu with traditional, healthy and veggie options all well executed. Friendly service. Best flan anywhere. Not fancy, and quite a kitschy  decor, but I plan to come back soon with friends. Doesn't hurt that the prices are reasonable and it's a byob.

A welcome addition to a neighborhood in dire need of a cultural infusion.  This young company has had a mixed bag of hits and misses, but I am certainly looking forward to the current season's offerings.

Kate Winters and Joshua's recently catered my brother's memorial service at Alverthorpe Manor at the Abington Arts Center. Everything was delicious and elegantly presented. Kate and the Joshua's staff managed every detail perfectly and made a difficult time so much easier for me and my family.

The Soon du bu, was perfect on such a COLD DAY!
foodie: Recommended this gonna be my favorite restaurant I love hotpot and the salad bar. Fresh food nice fresh vegetables. Friendly staff good service.

Soho is by far one of my favorites!  My waistline is afraid Soho will become a weekly thing.

I  this place because being a artist myself I use this building as an outsource to get away from all of the craziness in this world. It inspires me to think larger with my pieces and inspires me to use my talent as a therapeutic remedy.

Cezanne, Picasso, Van Gogh, Renoir, Miro....need I say more?

I checked it out during the Opera Night, which seemed fun although I just stuck to the paintings.

An impressive collection of art and I am still not done checking it out.  It blows the SF De Young museum collection out of the water.
Local museum with quality art on display.  Great way to get some culture on a rainy day.

A+ shop with talented artists, fair pricing, walk-in availability and extreme cleanliness. Recommend everyone in the neighborhood stops in to get some work.

Clean and professional--great artists who work with you where you are. I went with a group and it was first tattoos for some, old hat for others of us and Weylin treated us equally well, and helped design exactly what we wanted.

This store is so cute. A well curated mix of local artists/people craftier than me, you can find a gift for anyone here (or leave with things for yourself. No shame.) There's always something new and exciting and the owner is extremely friendly and involved in the community!
foodie: Absolutely wonderful experience dining here. We decided to enjoy the tasting menu, which is 7 course selected by the chef. This was a wonderful choice since you get to try 4 appetizers, 2 entrees and 1 dessert. Everything was amazing from beginning to end. The pace of the meal was also perfect.

Ok tasting food with a unique menu of options to choose from. Seating is limited and reservations are helpful during prime hours.

Best bar. If you're going to splurge this is the place to do it. Sweet bartender. Delightful experience. My buddies loved it too. Especially the sweet bartender.

First time here last night. Nice, quant place that offers outdoor seating. Happy hour is great with a nice 1/2 off draft list. Tough to beat $3 craft beers. Friendly bartenders and a cool vibe. Menu is interesting if not a bit limited. I will be back to try the alligator/catfish burger.
family: Great neighborhood spot.  Small family run, not trying to be anything but a good place to get a great meal and a beer, and they do it well.

I'd recommend it to anyone in the neighborhood!

Great local restaurant/bar to grab a drink and watch the game at. The service at a table can be hit or miss but the bartenders seem to be consistent so if you don't mind sitting at the bar....go and grab a stool!

Great neighborhood bar. Fantastic and unique wings. Great samosas. Extremely friendly bartender.

This place is such a good addition to the neighborhood! I've been a few times and my food is always delicious and the staff is super friendly.

Favorite local spot! Great food and staff, nice chill vibe. A great restaurant to bring visitors.

artsy: Great staff and creative Artists.

This place supports local artists. Every time I come down to philly I make it a point to come to this shop and buy SOMETHING. 
Very cool place.

This is a great place to pick up unique items and posters that are certain to become conversation pieces that you'll cherish for years. The staff is always friendly and helpful and you're sure to find something worth taking home. As far as the art work and posters are concerned they've got everyt...

This place always provides a fantastic evening. I attended a session led by Casey and had the time of my life! It's a laid back painting session facilitated by local artists. You're allowed to (encouraged to) BYOB to enjoy libations with the painting. It is fast paced, limiting conversation, but ...

I don't have a creative bone in my body, and I was skeptical that our group of ten would actually produce decent paintings, but boy was I wrong!

Olan was a great teacher - funny, encouraging, and always willing to assist. All of our paintings turned out pretty darn good, and at the end of the se...
foodie: Amazing food with delicately layered flavors subtle hint of fresh local herbs, a spectacular cheese menu with various cheese flights,  the food will not disappoint. The tale service was outstanding! Our waitress was beyond words with her knowledge and description of the courses.

This guys menu is a culinary work of art.. sophisticated and well-thought ingredient combinations that burst when they hit your mouth. Awesome, laid-back, casual ambience. Very reasonably priced. You need to eat here.
Flavorful order and sit down stop. Clean and colorful restaurant with a killer menu. Delicious food and churos!

This was a wonderful restaurant with delicious, inventive food that was beautifully presented. We went during restaurant week and had their fixed price menu. Everything was perfect - flavorful, fresh, with a really interesting take on ingredients, like a beet borscht salad that combined different...
Boss of food here great customer service really love the place that we will come back with the family next time. Thanks a lot guys I love the food again can't say enough wonderful job thanks.
nightlife: Awesome place to get drinks and watch free live music. A nice spacious bar upstairs with a lounge style room. Nice live music thu, fri and Sat nights.

This place always confuses me when I come here on a Friday or Saturday night- is it a bar? a club?  a restaurant/lounge? They have a mix of all these elements, as there is a bar, a DJ spinning in the background (and a few folks on the dance floor) and and a back area with tables for eating.

I gu...
Awesome bar and a great addition to South street. Great place to watch a game and have some beers. My wife and I often take our friends to Milkboy and hang out upstairs when they visit.
Great neighborhood pub.  Recommend the Tuesday afternoon Doo Wop.  Fun starts between 2 and 3 for anyone that either has the day off or wants to leave work early to enjoy.
Upstairs area was fun  last saturday night and there was live music, semi friendly bartender and pretty good food
family: Great place to bring the kids where you can keep an eye on them throughout most of the playground from many angles. This was also in a great neighborhood that allowed for a safer feel even when lots of people were walking by on their way home from work, etc.

Nice and clean playground. Plenty for the kids to do. Seems to be well kept and organized. Picnic tables for you and the kiddies to have lunch! Close to South Street if you want to take a stroll down to Penns Landing
What a cute park near South street. There were a ton of families here and its such a nice olace for the kids to run around and play. Plenty of shade for the hot days and very clean.

Fresh and delicious food and fantastic service.  They've even made Mac and Cheese into a breakfast item!  Outdoor seating as well. I'm not sure why the listing says not kid friendly. They have high chairs, and our kid loved it.  Maybe not great if you have a really picky eater?
Best place to eat in the city, great with little kids too
upscale: good food, exotic experience.

Extremely classy, upscale and clean feeling inside. The nicest and most welcoming sex shop I've ever been to. Nothing else compares to this place. Super helpful staff, from the moment I called. They helped fit me into a beautiful corset and then had it specially sent to me, since the color I want...
Consistently delicious, uncomplicated yet inviting food and atmosphere.
Outstanding. Creative menu that made sense. Fresh ingredients, insightful waitstaff and comfortable decor. Every farm-to-table establishment should take it's cue from Talula's.
Exceptional decor, exceptional service, exceptional food. Absolutely loved everything we ordered. Hands down one of the best restaurants I've been to.
cultural: This is an amazing hidden gem in old city ! I had no idea that it existed until a good friend invited me there for lunch . It is a GREAT space with community art all around, many different events are planned there and the food and service is AWESOME and you can BYOB! Check it out !

An amazing and unique experience, from the atmosphere to the food itself. The inside is draped with rugs, tapestries, and decor that set make you forget that you're in the city. I came with a huge group of people for my friend's birthday, and we were easily accommodated. A belly dancer came by, a...

I came here while checking out all of the historic sites. Really open inside.  If you are looking for quality ingredients, fresh brewed beverages, and an affordable price, this is your place. Food was good, place want too busy, and the service was nice.
Fun shops, bars and interesting crowd in this area. Oh and of course, hipster and touristy!

It's a gorgeous house steeped in history, where you can take a tour by the house administrators who are really knowledgeable and super friendly. It's gorgeous inside and out and even if you aren't a history geek you'll find it pretty interesting!

artsy: Reasonable prices, professional staff, and great artwork. I've been going to Keir for a few years now and it's always a positive experience. Highly recommend
This is my probably bast restaurant,,,,if you're going this place met chef Brian . He work as a art food was amazing and delicious service also good we will come soon
Started by ESL student of mine, Bina,who has improved decor and, although menu remains solidly delightful.
Another tattoo, another happy customer. I went to Mike Flood for a tattoo for my daughter. More than happy with the work, the artist, and the atmosphere in general.

Tori is the best.I was in for the first time to the studio and just had a good vibe from the young staff and friendly owners.I have used the same stylist in LA for the past ten years and when visiting my fiancee in Philly i wanted a change and Tori did an amazing transformation and truly made me ...
foodie: This is my probably bast restaurant,,,,if you're going this place met chef Brian . He work as a art food was amazing and delicious service also good we will come soon

Perfectly cooked meats and a nice venue to boot. The menu was extensive yet satisfying. The food is different from any other restaurant I've tried but very tasty too! I hope to go back and explore more of the menu.
Amazing  restaurant with great food, particularly soups and meats and a wonderful atmosphere great place to bring a lot of wine and enjoy a long dinner.

This is our second time dining at this restaurant and the food is amazing!  Everything is very tasty and fresh.  Waitresses are friendly and helpful.  We are usually so busy eating that we forget to take pictures of food, hahaha. But our favorite dishes so far are: khinkali with lamb, lulya kebab...

Excellent pleasant service plus amazing tasty food here.  We ordered the mixed meat platter and everything is delicious but my favorite got to be the lamp chop. Dessert may be too sweet for me but really good too. Totally recommend this amazing Turkish restaurant.
nightlife: I was here on Saturday for a few drinks with a couple of friends. On Saturday nights they have a combo of karaoke and dj'd music.  It's not a fancy bar but they have cheap drinks and entertainment.

The new bartenders are great...very welcoming and friendly. Friday night dj is awesome. A lot of tv's with most games on and will change the station if you ask. Think quizzo is on Monday nights...there's a jazz night...a lady's night, etc. Trying to do good things with this old Somerton staple. G...

Just my neighborhood bar. Come here with friends for a few drinks during the weeknights, have some grub. The lobster bisque is pretty good. Most of the time its nice and quiet so its good for discussion with friends.

This is a good spot... Was here before Christmas with a few friends and we had a great time!  It all counts which people u go with as usual.. The bartenders were attentive and were checking in with us to make sure we had enough to drink, etc...

I'd return here next time, aka next year (I live in...

Great spot for live music- there is a parking lot with about 100 spaces in the back (used for SEPTA), and they have a full menu as well as a full bar here!
Good food and great prices, two pool tables and numerous games like darts everywhere
family: I love their child care rooms with great staff interacting with the children. Love this place.
Good n small place to hangout with friends. Responsible owner always takes care of customers.

Great atmosphere, very good service and very good sushi at a great price. Not sure what more you could ask for. I highly recommend the lobster dynamite, it's probably the best that I have ever had.
Clean, good service, better than Ur average dive bar. Fancy custom drinks, nice and strong but not gross. Good times.

Love this place. Never let me down yet. Prices are great, sushi is great, ambience is great. Nothing I can complain about. If you're looking for a more upscale experience, I would suggest Ooka but for almost everyone, Ninja is the place to go. Love it!

cultural: Very unique and authentic place! Very kind owners and the servers! Delicious food and beautiful decor! Strongly recommended!
Great food, nice interior and awesome people are working here. Excellent place to celebrate a wedding or any other family occasion, some corporate events. Highly recommended.

Amazing place! We were celebrating friend's birthday.  He ordered banquet style.  Everything was delicious and so much food.  The service was exceptional! Wonderful ethnic restaurant. Very cozy with great food, atmosfear, service and not loud beautiful music on the weekends. Presentation of food is very beautiful too. Always a pleasure to go there and price is average. Well worth it with BYOB

What an amazing, fun, experience. Friendly staff with limited English understanding.  Great place to party with a fun group while enjoying food and drinks with great music and dancing all night long! Very fun.

This was my weekly go-to lunch spot while running a construction project over the summer. Excellent food every time! I wish they were close to my house!!

artsy:
This is exactly what you're looking for in a neighborhood bar. Good food, drinks & music. Anyone throwing shots at it being in the "hood" doesn't belong here. 

Located in the lower part of Kingsessing, this bar has what you're looking for. The DJ spins music catered to those in their 30s & 40s b...

What a great find in the neighborhood.  Super clean atmosphere & kitchen, serving very fresh food for breakfast & lunch & also fresh baked goods as well as a varied selection of items including some changing dishes.  From lighter to heartier fare.  Really nice staff & cute corner location.
Real lumber yard in west Philly. Carries a good supply of sustainable building products that I use for my construction company.

I love this place and have been going for years. Even though I don't go often, Sara, the practitioner always remembers what body parts give me trouble. I love the ambiance: white nice machines, dimly lit room, and the nice blankets they cover you with. You can sleep and rest as long as you'd like...
Attentive practitioner, who always remembers my aliments; soothing atmosphere; and a sliding scale. What else can you ask for?
foodie: Awesome place to grab a quick bite to eat. The owner is a chill guy, really nice and takes pride in his work. Good, cheap, yummy food that doesn't break the bank but keeps the tummy happy and full. Plus they have a super clean, fantastic bathroom.
Food is delicious! Service is great. I especially love the beef quesadilla and pork tacos. The guac and pico I can just eat with a fork!!! Try this gem! You will be glad you did!!!

A great new addition to the neighborhood and now offering dinner- the food was great with delicious options.  We BYOBed and enjoyed sitting outside although the interior is pleasant and inviting.  We enjoyed the caprese salad, and traditional meatballs with a dollop of ricotta and then feasted ov...

Wasn't what I was expecting in aesthetics, but more than made up for in the food. It is small, family owned place with only two tables. The closest thing experience would be a Chipotle, just a mom and pop version with notably better food. They had chicken mole, never had it before, was very good.

Le Baobab is my favourite West African spot in Philadelphia.

It's a simple little restaurant that usually does 3 dishes: Grilled chicken, lamb, or whole fish. They say that they will cook other foods if it's a large enough order, so I've never had the chance to taste anything else.

There's a kitchen in the back that serves burgers,  fries...

This place is great! I had a punctured tire and was riding on a donut. I showed up at Stan's at 4:30 and was out by 4:40! Quick service, friendly guys, and they definitely don't rip you off. I've been to Pepboys before and I will never go back after finding Stan's.

Awesome place to grab a quick bite to eat. The owner is a chill guy, really nice and takes pride in his work. Good, cheap, yummy food that doesn't break the bank but keeps the tummy happy and full. Plus they have a super clean, fantastic bathroom.
I have been going to this restaurant since it opened and now my children and soon grandchildren will eat here, God willing they stay in business for many more years to come.

About the only complaint I have is that they could really use an...

Awesome selection of beers, great bar staff, and is usually the perfect crowd for a low key bar night. Two dart boards and a pool table complete the time. Having been born and raised right up the street, it's nice to go to a neighborhood bar that isn't full of neighborhood people every now and then.

So this was bar two in the top of the hill bar crawl and once again I'm happy to say will be back.  We pulled in just before midnight and were greeted by the friendly bar staff. It's a diner.... with a full bar... a few craft beers... good whiskey... and good pancakes. My usual bartenders, Lily and Christian are wonderful.
family: The food and drinks here are consistently good. I can't wait for the inside to open again. This is a good place to watch a game or get brunch outside. We can always come here with a stroller/toddler and everyone is very accommodating. I'd recommend the philly wooders, nachos, and cheesesteaks!

Such a cute, friendly bakery and the egg and cheese biscuit sandwiches and chocolate cupcake were delicious. They also had a kid's corner with lots of books, blocks, and puzzles to keep my toddler entertained. A great addition to the neighborhood!

Decent service, limited menu due to COVID but options were okay. Of course there's only outdoor seating at this time. My suggestion, don't take the kids if they are squeamish around bugs. Total buzz kill!

This place keeps getting better and better! Came here pre covid and the food was good but just went this past weekend and it is even better!  The wings are awesome, burgers are really good and the drinks are really good!
